title: calliandra asplenioides
intro: Calliandra asplenioides, also known as Powder Puff Tree or Fairy's Duster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Calliandra asplenioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and provide relief from bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
